definition: Non-Performing Asset - Loan account with DPD > 90 days per RBI IRACP norms
NPA account with classification between 90 and 365 days past due
NPA account outstanding for more than 1 year (classified as DOUBTFUL_1 or DOUBTFUL_2)
NPA account identified as loss asset by bank or RBI inspectors, uncollectible
Accounts with active fraud reports or EWS alerts and overdue status
Days Past Due - the number of days a payment is overdue
Capital adequacy, Asset quality, Management, Earnings, Liquidity, Systems rating (Scale 1 to 5, where 1 is best and 5 is worst)
Inspection ratings of 4 or 5 requiring corrective actions
Annual Financial Inspection conducted by the RBI under Section 35 of the Banking Regulation Act
Fraud Monitoring Return System for reporting bank fraud to RBI
Difference between date of detection and date of reporting to RBI
Fraud reporting delay exceeding 21 days from detection (RBI FMRS violation)
Fictional or artificial restructuring of credit to avoid classification as NPA
